snippet.title: Wednesday Bible Study | 13 May 2026
snippet.description:
Wednesday Bible Study is a weekly meeting of Emmanuel House of Worship, Secunderabad where we study the Holy Bible to learn and grow in the word of God.

Please do join us every Wednesday at 7 pm IST.

Emmanuel House of Worship also meets for below programs:
👉All Day Prayer on Second Saturday at 10 am IST
👉Sunday Worship 1st Service (English) at 7:00 am IST
👉Sunday Worship 2nd Service (English & Telugu) at 9:00 am IST
👉Youth Fellowship on alternate Sundays after the 2nd Service

Also follow EHOW on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/emmanuelhouseofworshiphyd

#WednesdayBibleStudy

snippet.title: Sunday Worship | Second Service | 10 May 2026
snippet.description:
Let's gather to worship the Lord corporately and to take part in the holy communion.

Please do join us every Sunday at 9:00 am IST.

Emmanuel House of Worship also meets for below programs:
👉Sunday Worship 1st Service (English) at 7:00 am IST,
👉Wednesday Bible Study at 7 pm IST and
👉Youth Fellowship on Sunday after the 2nd Service,
👉All Day Prayer on Second Saturday at 10 am IST 

Also follow Emmanuel House of Worship on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/emmanuelhouseofworshiphyd

#LiveWorship #SundayService #WordOfGod
